title: SPBR-Mirror
description: SPBR Patches Changed jigsaw block's texture and PBR make it into Mirror. Do reflection test with raytracing shaders!
body:
# SPBR Mirror Patch
This is a Patch Pack for [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)  
Changed jigsaw block's texture and PBR make it into Mirror.   
You can do optical experiments such as reflection experiments with raytracing shaders!  
**This Pack is made under LabPBR standard**  
If you want to use this pack you need a LabPBR supported Shader.  
And should put it _above_ the SPBR Main Pack
![Mirror](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f321582549c59c4da3e95051916802c9fa7c356f.jpeg)
_This Pack Can Be Use Alone._
